name: Verifi
description: Verifi (a Visa solution) offers CDRN, Order Insight and Rapid Dispute Resolution APIs that let merchants and issuers collaborate to prevent chargebacks before they happen. It is a core piece of dispute infrastructure for major e-commerce pl

seo.title: Verifi — Fraud & Risk Management
seo.meta_description: Verifi: Verifi (a Visa solution) offers CDRN, Order Insight and Rapid Dispute Resolution APIs that let merchants and issuers collaborate to prevent chargebacks

when_to_use: Visa CDRN fraud alert pre-chargeback merchant notification
Order Insight API for issuer-side dispute evidence delivery
Rapid Dispute Resolution for frictionless chargeback prevention
Issuer-merchant data collaboration to reduce friendly fraud
Dispute prevention infrastructure for e-commerce platforms

pros: CDRN and RDR cut chargebacks pre-filing
Deep issuer coverage on Visa rails
cons: Best value mostly on Visa transactions
Onboarding routed through PSPs and sales
Requires clean order data to be effective
Not a full upstream fraud engine
review.verdict: Essential chargeback-prevention infrastructure for large Visa merchants; pair with Ethoca for full issuer coverage.
review.best_for: Large card-not-present merchants with heavy Visa chargeback volume.
review.not_for: Small merchants with minimal disputes or those needing upstream authorization-time fraud scoring.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: custom pricing alone is not HWM evidence
